reason: Behind-the-scenes TV quiz scandal strips away the facade of America’s favorite game.
A fabricated war feeds the media machine until one skeptic digs and finds the lie.
An undercover agent’s life hijacked by a web of deceit and false identities he’s sworn to uphold.
A gentleman thief spins a tale of honor that begins to crumble under polite scrutiny.
A lone survivor unearths conspiracies in a submerged vessel, doubting every whispered claim.
A struggling racer’s spectacular rise traced back to a hidden trick that can’t withstand a test.
A lounge singer’s concealed past unravels under a journalist’s unwavering investigation.
A corporate whistle-blower uncovers poisoned products, then fights to prove his findings aren’t fiction.
“Pure meat” exposes the meatpacking lie, and the public gets a side of corruption with every cut.
A burnt-out convict’s memoir of crime raises doubts until his publisher reads between the lines.
